verses.latin_vulgate: Canticum graduum.   Memento, Domine, David,  et omnis mansuetudinis ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲל֥וֹת זְכוֹר־יְהֹוָ֥ה לְדָוִ֑ד אֵ֝֗ת כׇּל־עֻנּוֹתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Lord, remember David, and all his afflictions:

verses.latin_vulgate: sicut juravit Domino ;  votum vovit Deo Jacob :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֣ר נִ֭שְׁבַּע לַֽיהֹוָ֑ה נָ֝דַ֗ר לַאֲבִ֥יר יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.king_james: How he sware unto the Lord, and vowed unto the mighty God of Jacob;

verses.latin_vulgate: Si introiero in tabernaculum domus meæ ;  si ascendero in lectum strati mei ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־אָ֭בֹא בְּאֹ֣הֶל בֵּיתִ֑י אִם־אֶ֝עֱלֶ֗ה עַל־עֶ֥רֶשׂ יְצוּעָֽי׃
verses.king_james: Surely I will not come into the tabernacle of my house, nor go up into my bed;

verses.latin_vulgate: si dedero somnum oculis meis,  et palpebris meis dormitationem,
verses.king_james: I will not give sleep to mine eyes, or slumber to mine eyelids,

verses.latin_vulgate: et requiem temporibus meis,  donec inveniam locum Domino,  tabernaculum Deo Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־אֶמְצָ֣א מָ֭קוֹם לַיהֹוָ֑ה מִ֝שְׁכָּנ֗וֹת לַאֲבִ֥יר יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.king_james: Until I find out a place for the Lord, an habitation for the mighty God of Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce audivimus eam in Ephrata ;  invenimus eam in campis silvæ.
verses.king_james: Lo, we heard of it at Ephratah: we found it in the fields of the wood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Introibimus in tabernaculum ejus ;  adorabimus in loco ubi steterunt pedes ejus.
verses.king_james: We will go into his tabernacles: we will worship at his footstool.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surge, Domine, in requiem tuam,  tu et arca sanctificationis tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קוּמָ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה לִמְנוּחָתֶ֑ךָ אַ֝תָּ֗ה וַאֲר֥וֹן עֻזֶּֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Arise, O Lord, into thy rest; thou, and the ark of thy strength.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacerdotes tui induantur justitiam,  et sancti tui exsultent.
verses.king_james: Let thy priests be clothed with righteousness; and let thy saints shout for joy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter David servum tuum  non avertas faciem christi tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּ֭עֲבוּר דָּוִ֣ד עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ אַל־תָּ֝שֵׁ֗ב פְּנֵ֣י מְשִׁיחֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: For thy servant David’s sake turn not away the face of thine anointed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juravit Dominus David veritatem,  et non frustrabitur eam :  De fructu ventris tui  ponam super sedem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִשְׁבַּֽע־יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ לְדָוִ֡ד אֱמֶת֮ לֹא־יָשׁ֢וּב מִ֫מֶּ֥נָּה מִפְּרִ֥י בִטְנְךָ֑ אָ֝שִׁ֗ית לְכִסֵּא־לָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord hath sworn in truth unto David; he will not turn from it; Of the fruit of thy body will I set upon thy throne.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si custodierint filii tui testamentum meum,  et testimonia mea hæc quæ docebo eos,  et filii eorum usque in sæculum  sedebunt super sedem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִֽם־יִשְׁמְר֬וּ בָנֶ֨יךָ ׀ בְּרִיתִי֮ וְעֵדֹתִ֥י ז֗וֹ אֲלַ֫מְּדֵ֥ם גַּם־בְּנֵיהֶ֥ם עֲדֵי־עַ֑ד יֵ֝שְׁב֗וּ לְכִסֵּא־לָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: If thy children will keep my covenant and my testimony that I shall teach them, their children shall also sit upon thy throne for evermore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam elegit Dominus Sion :  elegit eam in habitationem sibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־בָחַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֣ה בְּצִיּ֑וֹן אִ֝וָּ֗הּ לְמוֹשָׁ֥ב לֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: For the Lord hath chosen Zion; he hath desired it for his habitation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc requies mea in sæculum sæculi ;  hic habitabo, quoniam elegi eam.
verses.king_james: This is my rest for ever: here will I dwell; for I have desired it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viduam ejus benedicens benedicam ;  pauperes ejus saturabo panibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צֵ֭ידָהּ בָּרֵ֣ךְ אֲבָרֵ֑ךְ אֶ֝בְיוֹנֶ֗יהָ אַשְׂבִּ֥יעַֽ לָֽחֶם׃
verses.king_james: I will abundantly bless her provision: I will satisfy her poor with bread.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacerdotes ejus induam salutari,  et sancti ejus exsultatione exsultabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽ֭כֹהֲנֶיהָ אַלְבִּ֣ישׁ יֶ֑שַׁע וַ֝חֲסִידֶ֗יהָ רַנֵּ֥ן יְרַנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.king_james: I will also clothe her priests with salvation: and her saints shall shout aloud for joy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Illuc producam cornu David ;  paravi lucernam christo meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֤ם אַצְמִ֣יחַ קֶ֣רֶן לְדָוִ֑ד עָרַ֥כְתִּי נֵ֝֗ר לִמְשִׁיחִֽי׃
verses.king_james: There will I make the horn of David to bud: I have ordained a lamp for mine anointed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inimicos ejus induam confusione ;  super ipsum autem efflorebit sanctificatio mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: א֭וֹיְבָיו אַלְבִּ֣ישׁ בֹּ֑שֶׁת וְ֝עָלָ֗יו יָצִ֥יץ נִזְרֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: His enemies will I clothe with shame: but upon himself shall his crown flourish.
